## Transcript

I just helped this creator, this creator, and this creator go viral on Tik Tok. And if you implement the five-step strategy that I share with you in this video, in fact, if you steal this five-step strategy, it's going to increase the odds that you go viral right now in [music] 2026. The best part about this is it's more simple and more straightforward than ever before. Change number one that you need to make is you need to make sure that you're posting at the best times in order to go viral on TikTok right now. And there are three of them. The first best time is going to be from 10:30 a.m. to 11:30 a.m. The second best time is going to be from 2 to 3:30 p.m. And then the final best time is going to be from 7 to 9:00 p.m. And ideally, what you want to be doing is posting in at least 1 to two of those. On top of that, you want to make sure that you're not violating some rules when it comes to posting on Tik Tok. First and foremost, do not post anything less than 5 seconds. Tik Tok just won't push it out. Now, they're going to be marking those posts as spam, and this will actually decrease your odds of going viral on Tik Tok. The second thing that you need to make sure that you're doing is never uploading content back to back to back. You do not want to do that on Tik Tok, and instead, you want to wait at least 1 hour in between posts because if you wait at least 1 hour in between posts, you're going to be eligible to show up on the same person's for you page. The only time that you should ever post back toback is if you're posting about something that is mega viral. For example, let's say that you were at the Super Bowl and you were posting about the Super Bowl, then it would be fine to post back to back to back. Or if you were reporting on some live news thing, you could post back to back to back. But if it's not like that, you do not want to do that because essentially what's going to end up happening is if you post and somebody sees your post, they are not going to be eligible to see another one of your posts for an hour if you're posting back to back to back. So, you don't want to do that because if you're in a small niche, you can actually extinguish how many views you could end up getting and then that pool of people that could see your other piece of content dries up and then as a result you end up with videos that didn't get that much reach. Now, the second change you want to make sure that you're making is you want to make sure that your account is actually set up correctly. And this is very easy to do. Let me explain. Now, in order to show you how to actually set up your page correctly, I wanted to show you a bunch of different pages that are going to be set up correctly. So, the first one is going to be Dr. Jones right here. We can see he's gained over 350,000 followers, and he's doing three things, right? In fact, he's doing four things, right? The first thing he's doing right is all of his playlists right here are named after all the different things that he helps with. For example, carnivore diet, GLP1 news, GLP1 updates, and if we filter by popular right here, we could see it's why he's gone viral hundreds of times on Tik Tok. In addition to that though, he's using a profile image that is zoomed in, that is bright, that's where he's wearing this blue shirt. In addition to that, his name right here is lasting weight loss. He doesn't just have some random name that tells you his name. His name is his niche because it increases curiosity and gets people to actually watch his content. And the final thing is if we come over here to his description right here, we see GLP1, we see peptide, we see hormone, we see energy, we see aging. And guess what? That is what he's actually talking about. Now, if we come over to Mike right here, we're going to see the same thing again. He's gone viral hundreds of times on TikTok. And what do we see again? He's got playlists right here that tell you about everything. Credit repair, debt collectors, build your teens credit. In addition to that, if we come over to his name, what do we see? The same thing right here. Credit guy. Why does he have that? Because he talks about credit. What do we see right here in his profile? Very zoomed in, very bright. It's why he has these blue lights in the background. And then in addition to that, we could see Mike the credit guy, money news, credit score, fix your credit, increase your credit, all these different keywords. And if we come over to my page, again, I've gone viral on TikTok hundreds of times. This isn't speculation. This isn't me making this up. We see the same exact thing. We see Rob the AI guy. I have my niche in my name. We can see this is green. This is zoomed in. And then finally, we have multiple different keywords that match the content that I'm making in my description. And if you have all three or all four of these things that increase the odds that you go viral. Now, the next change is you need to make sure that you are only posting about topics and only posting in formats that are trending on your niche. And ideally, you want these trends to be from the last 72 hours. Because if you are posting about anything other than what is trending in your niche, by definition, you are quite frankly wasting your time and you're just not posting according to what the Tik Tok algorithm wants because the Tik Tok algorithm works based off of interest and based off of history. So people that watch content about SD cards get shown more content about SD cards. People that watch content about coffee get shown more content about coffee. Now, of course, you're probably not making content about coffee or about SD cards, but it doesn't matter what your niche is. There are trends that are happening in them. And this brand new AI tool I'm about to show you makes it incredibly easy, not only for you to find what's trending, but also to copy what's trending. Let me explain. Now, that AI tool that I'm using in order to find these trends is going to be contentbuddy.ai. Because once you sign into contentbuddy.ai, you're going to see right here, discover trends in your niche, and we're going to see find Tik Tok trends. If we click on this right here, you could see that we're going to have to put in our email address, put in keywords for our niche and competitors in our niche. And then guess what this is going to do. This is going to actually go through and find us everything that is trending in our niche right now. And then guess what we could do with this. Let's say that we like this one right here, how to make Chad GBD swear, and we want to recreate this video. We're simply just going to copy this link. We're going to come back over to contentbuddy.ai. And we're going to be able to see that if we scroll down, they have this AI video remixer tool. If we click launch on this tool and then we're actually put this link in here and click on remix video. And just like that, we have this brand new script that we should use. We have these new hooks that we should use, these new descriptions, these new hashtags. And if we actually use this in our content, it's going to increase the odds that we go viral. and it just took us way less time. We didn't have to guess on what to post. We found out exactly what's trending in our niche. Then we came over here and built the script, built a hook, built the description off of what has already worked. Now, in addition to that, if we come over here back to dashboard, we can see they have tons of other tools. For example, they allow you to find out whether or not you're Shadowbann. They'll actually optimize your bio for you. They'll allow you to create thumbnails right here. And they even have a viral music list. And if we click on this, we can see exactly what it sounds or trending right now on Tik Tok. And this tool right here is essential if you want to spend less time creating content and you want to go viral faster on Tik Tok because if you're not using this, your competitors are. That's why they're getting more views than you. And the best part about Content Buddy is that if you go to the pin comment below, you could get started with it today for only $1. Please don't let $1 be the difference between you going viral on TikTok or you continuing to struggle. They have so many other AI tools that are going to help you spend less time creating content and get more views and more followers and increase your odds of going viral. So, what are you waiting for? Go to the pin comment below and get started with it today. Now, the next thing that you need to make sure that you're doing is you need to make sure that you are getting people to comment on your posts. In fact, this is the most important type of engagement that you can currently get on Tik Tok. Shares don't matter as much as they used to. Saves don't matter as much as they used to. Likes don't matter as much as they used to. Even watch time matters, but comments are going to help you get more watch time and get more engagement because what you want to happen is you want people to be in the comment section going back and forth with each other because then in the background your video is looping or you want people commenting whatever keyword shows up in the hook of your video, in the description of your video, in the hashtags of your video because then what ends up happening is Tik Tok says, "Hey, this video is actually about this topic and these people are actually engaging with this video." So, they must be super interested in this. And then what ends up happening is your content just ends up getting even more reach. Now, there are two ways for you to incentivize people to actually go into the comment section. The first one is to tell people to comment a specific keyword. For example, let's say I was making a video about Chach and I said, "If you want to see more videos like this, comment the word chachi below." It would increase the odds that people would go and do that. Or the second thing that you could do is say something provocative and get them to. For example, let's say that I was doing a post before the Super Bowl. I know the Super Bowl is already over and we saw the Seahawks win, but let's say that we were doing a post about that and we could say something like, "Do you want the Seahawks, the Patriots to win?" You get people to go to the pin comment below or you could ask people's opinion about something or you could ask people to rate something. What all these things are going to do is get people down in the comment section. That was just one strategy for you to be able to get more comments. The next strategy that you need to make sure that you're implementing is that you need to be replying to comments. Not just in the beginning, you need to be replying to a bunch of comments. And there are two ways that you could do this. The first way is going to be literally just replying to comments by you commenting back to people. The second way is going to be you replying to comments by making a video that actually replies to the comments. And both of those going to help increase your reach because it gets your viewers to say, "Hey, this person actually responds. This person actually engages. this person actually cares and it increases the odds that more people actually reply to you. And bonus tip, if you're a business, this works even better. Now, that last thing you need to make sure you're doing is you need to make sure that you are doubling down when something works. I cannot emphasize this enough. The second that you find a format that works, the second that you find a type of content that works, the second that you find a topic that works, you want to post about that thing until it stops working. This is the biggest mistake by far that I see small Tik Tok accounts make. they strike fire. They get something to go viral. They get something to get a lot of views and then what's the next thing that they do? Do something totally random. Participate in another trend. Post about something that doesn't matter. And this is the biggest mistake that you could possibly make. So what you want to do is get something to begin to work. Then you want to turn that format, you want to turn that topic, you want to turn that trend into the type of content that you make for at least the next few days. But for some people, this can literally last for years. In fact, I've worked with so many clients that have had one trend work, have had one format work, and that becomes a thing that they do for years, for months. And guess what? This is what actually leads to massive growth because one, you become recognized for something. And two, people begin to anticipate this thing from you, which doesn't bore them, but actually gets them to watch more content. Now, if you're still struggling to grow faster on TikTok, I personally want to help you. In fact, I want to work with you one-on-one to help you grow faster. If that sounds interesting, well, please check out this video right here that walks you through exactly how I can help you grow. In fact, it's what this creator, this creator, and this creator did in order to go viral on TikTok. And I want to help you next. Sound interesting? I'll see you over there.

![Influencer Marketing Hub](https://influencermarketinghub.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/03/cropped-imh_filled_pink-1-96x96.png)

by [Influencer Marketing Hub](https://influencermarketinghub.com/author/influencer-marketing-hub/)

Last Updated: March 24th, 2025

12 min read

[Social Media](https://influencermarketinghub.com/social-media/)

With TikTok being one of the most engaging social platforms, people no doubt spend a lot of time on the app. In fact, [167 million videos](https://influencermarketinghub.com/tiktok-stats/#toc-0) are watched on the platform in a single internet minute. This makes it the perfect platform for brands and creators alike to engage their audience and establish their social media presence.

That’s where [TikTok](https://influencermarketinghub.com/what-is-tiktok/) comments enter the picture, playing a major role in driving engagement and visibility for your content. Let’s find out more about the importance of TikTok comments and how you can drive more engagement.

* * *

### **Ultimate Guide on TikTok Comment:**

- [The Importance of TikTok Comments](https://influencermarketinghub.com/tiktok-comments/#toc-0)
- [Controlling Your Comments Settings for TikTok](https://influencermarketinghub.com/tiktok-comments/#toc-1)
- [8 Tips to Drive Engagement with TikTok Comments](https://influencermarketinghub.com/tiktok-comments/#toc-2)
- [Frequently Asked Questions](https://influencermarketinghub.com/tiktok-comments/#toc-3)

* * *

## **The Importance of TikTok Comments**

The way that TikTok suggests content to users is pretty similar to other platforms in that it uses engagements to determine the popularity of the content. Although the [TikTok algorithm](https://influencermarketinghub.com/tiktok-algorithm/) is extremely robust and considers a bunch of factors to determine what content to display to which users, it prioritizes engagement rates to finalize its decision.

Even when it comes to engagements, comments play a more significant role than views or likes. This is because viewing and liking a video doesn’t require much effort while you have to actually put in some effort to leave a comment. People have to spend at least a few seconds thinking of something to comment, opening the comment section, and then typing in their comment. This involves a lot more action that simply liking or viewing a video, which suggests that someone cared enough about the content to comment on it.

That means the more comments you get for your video, the better TikTok will understand that your content is worth displaying to more people. So, when you get a lot of comments on your videos, the better your chances of attracting more followers and [growing your presence](https://influencermarketinghub.com/how-to-use-tiktok-beginners/).

* * *

## **Controlling Your Comments Settings for TikTok**

TikTok offers plenty of features to help you take control of your comments. This includes controlling who gets to comment on your videos and even filtering comments before they’re displayed to everyone.

### **Choosing who gets to comment**

From your account privacy settings, TikTok lets you control who can comment on your videos. The different options are:

- Everyone (only for public accounts), which will allow everyone to leave a comment
- Followers (only for private accounts), which will allow only your followers to leave a comment
- Friends, which will allow only those followers you follow back to leave a comment
- No one, which will turn off your entire comments section and prevent everyone from leaving a comment

![Choosing who gets to comment](https://s.influencermarketinghub.com/imaginary/convert?type=webp&url=https://influencermarketinghub.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/09/image2-473x1024.jpg)

These settings will be applied for all your videos by default. You can also customize the settings for each video before posting it. Additionally, you have the option to manually change the settings for a single existing video.

### **Filtering comments**

The comment filtering feature of TikTok is much more robust than any other platform. It provides you with three different ways to filter comments:

- Filter all comments, which will hide recent comments on your videos unless you specifically approve them
- Filter spam and offensive comments, which will hide comments that may be spam or offensive unless you specifically approve them
- Filter keywords, which will hide comments containing certain keywords unless you specifically approve them. TikTok lets you add the keywords you want to filter from your comments section.

If you have any of these comment filters on, you can go to the comment management section to review your filtered comments. You can then manually approve the comments you want to display in your comments section.

**Related Content:**

- [TikTok Money Calculator \[Influencer Engagement & Earnings Est...](https://influencermarketinghub.com/tiktok-money-calculator/)\
- [TikTok Marketing 101: How to Market Your Brand on One of the Most ...](https://influencermarketinghub.com/tiktok-marketing/)\
- [TikTok Marketing for Beginners – A Marketer’s Guide to...](https://influencermarketinghub.com/tiktok-marketing-guide/)\
\
* * *\
\
## **8 Tips to Drive Engagement with TikTok Comments**\
\
Now that you know how comments on TikTok can benefit you, it’s time to find out how to get more comments and use them to [boost your TikTok engagement](https://influencermarketinghub.com/increasing-engagement-rate-on-tiktok/). Let’s take a look at some of the best ways to drive engagement using TikTok comments.\
\
![8 tips to drive engagement with tiktok comments](https://s.influencermarketinghub.com/imaginary/convert?type=webp&url=https://influencermarketinghub.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/09/image1-730x1024.png)\
\
### **1\. Ask relevant questions**\
\
Questions are a great way to get people to interact with your TikTok videos. They serve as a prompt, guiding the audience about what to comment. This is perfect because it inspires your viewers and makes it easier to come up with a comment since they basically just have to answer the question. As such, people who may not have thought of commenting before might feel compelled to leave a comment answering your question.\
\
For example, you could share different ways to style a single piece of clothing and ask the audience how they’d style it. Or you could post a video of your favorite meal and ask them what theirs is. It’s a super easy way to build a connection with your audience and get them to engage with your videos.\
\
Baskin Robbins, for instance, shared a video of the different ice cream flavors customers should try in July. They included a simple caption asking viewers which one they’d try first. As you can expect, there are plenty of comments answering the brand’s question.\
\
![Ask relevant questions ](https://s.influencermarketinghub.com/imaginary/convert?type=webp&url=https://influencermarketinghub.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/09/image4-1024x557.png)\
\
_Source: [tiktok.com](https://www.tiktok.com/@baskinrobbins/video/7122902812308081963?is_from_webapp=v1&item_id=7122902812308081963)_\
\
Alternatively, you could make it a little bit more challenging by asking people to take a guess about an upcoming product, partnership, or announcement. Mario Badescu shared the following TikTok in which they teased an upcoming product. In the caption, they asked the audience if they have any guesses as to what the product might be.\
\
![Ask relevant questions](https://s.influencermarketinghub.com/imaginary/convert?type=webp&url=https://influencermarketinghub.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/09/image3-1024x600.jpg)\
\
_Source: [tiktok.com](https://www.tiktok.com/@mariobadescu/video/7124726664143162667?is_from_webapp=v1&item_id=7124726664143162667)_\
\
* * *\
\
### **2\. Give them a prompt**\
\
Giving some kind of prompt as a call to action is another effective way to drive comments in your TikTok videos. Unlike the first tip, you won’t be asking a direct question but instead, providing the audience with instructions on what comments they should leave.\
\
The instruction doesn’t necessarily have to be very detailed. It can be something simple as asking them to drop their emoji reaction. Or it could go a bit further, asking them to share an experience relevant to what’s shown in the video.\
\
For example, Google shared a video with a “hack” for using Google Docs and asked people to Stitch it with a video of their own Google hacks. In the caption, they also included a prompt asking people to comment their favorite Google tricks.\
\
![Give them a prompt](https://s.influencermarketinghub.com/imaginary/convert?type=webp&url=https://influencermarketinghub.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/09/image6-1024x899.jpg)\
\
_Source: [tiktok.com](https://www.tiktok.com/@google/video/7108851128418241834?is_from_webapp=v1&item_id=7108851128418241834)_\
\
* * *\
\
### **3\. Ask for feedback or suggestions**\
\
One of the best ways to get people to comment on your TikTok videos is by asking them to share their feedback or suggestions. You’ll be able to collect tons of comments from people who want to share their experiences or express their unmet needs.\
\
Moreover, it’ll also help you gauge your audience’s needs and preferences, especially when it comes to the way you conduct your business or create your TikTok content. Be sure to pay close attention to those comments and try to implement their feedback and suggestions whenever or however possible. This shows your audience that you’re serious about their opinion, which could convince them to share more suggestions in the future.\
\
You could simply ask them if they liked a specific product. Or you could ask them what video they’d like to see next, which also saves you the trouble of having to brainstorm new content ideas.\
\
For example, in a video about a diamond Kakashi pendant, Icebox asked their viewers which character they should ice out next. The video received thousands of comments with many people adding their suggestions for the next character they’d like to see in the brand’s videos.\
\
> [@icebox](https://www.tiktok.com/@icebox?refer=embed "@icebox") Which character should we ice out next? ?? [#icebox](https://www.tiktok.com/tag/icebox?refer=embed "icebox") [#naruto](https://www.tiktok.com/tag/naruto?refer=embed "naruto") [#kakashi](https://www.tiktok.com/tag/kakashi?refer=embed "kakashi") [♬ cool kids - &lt3](https://www.tiktok.com/music/cool-kids-7047880933449435909?refer=embed "♬ cool kids - &lt3")\
\
* * *\
\
### **4\. Engage with genuine comments**\
\
The comments section is usually where people express their appreciation for you–whether it’s how much they love your content, your products, your sense of style, or even your entire brand. It’s also a place where they ask questions–such as what products you’re featuring in the video or where they can get the same thing.\
\
It’s crucial that you engage with these comments to acknowledge your audience or even answer important questions. When people feel acknowledged, they’re likely to feel more welcome and therefore, likely to keep engaging with your content in the future. Moreover, seeing your responses may inspire others to add their own comments in your next video.\
\
So, make sure you’re taking the time to engage with genuine comments. You could even pin certain comments that you consider important for others to see. This is also an effective way to guide the trajectory of conversions on your TikTok videos. See how Laura Mercier takes the time to answer important questions and even acknowledge viewer suggestions.\
\
![Engage with genuine comments](https://s.influencermarketinghub.com/imaginary/convert?type=webp&url=https://influencermarketinghub.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/09/image8-1024x1000.png)\
\
_Source: [tiktok.com](https://www.tiktok.com/@lauramercier/video/7097293236636601642?is_from_webapp=v1&item_id=7097293236636601642)_\
\
* * *\
\
### **5\. Feature influential creators**\
\
Seeing a face they know and love could encourage many viewers to comment on your video. That’s why you should consider featuring influential creators from time to time to boost the engagement on your TikTok videos. It’s also a great way to attract more viewers as people might feel inclined to watch the video when a familiar influencer’s face shows up in their For You pages. The more viewers you attract, the better your chances of driving comments.\
\
So, if you notice an [influential TikTok creator](https://influencermarketinghub.com/tiktok-influencers-search-tool/) using your product or mentioning your brand (in a positive light, of course), be sure to reach out and ask permission to share the video with your followers. You could also partner with influencers and create new content exclusively for your TikTok page.\
\
For example, Adobe regularly shares content featuring artists and creators who are a part of the Adobe community. The following video features artist couple Jack and Bec, who have a solid TikTok following of their own. Follow the link below to see the comments section flooded with appreciation for the couple.\
\
> [@adobe](https://www.tiktok.com/@adobe?refer=embed "@adobe") Bold colors, designs, and messages define the @jackandbec brand. ? [#AdobeTok](https://www.tiktok.com/tag/adobetok?refer=embed "adobetok") [♬ original sound - Adobe](https://www.tiktok.com/music/original-sound-7109199001790008107?refer=embed "♬ original sound - Adobe")\
\
* * *\
\
### **6\. Comment on other videos**\
\
While the goal is to get more people to comment on your TikTok videos, you shouldn’t just limit yourself to your videos. Engaging with other brand or creator accounts is an effective way to get your brand in front of a new audience. That means you could also drive new followers (and potential commentators) to your page.\
\
Leave witty, humorous, or informative comments that might get people to click on your profile to see what type of content you’re creating. Focus on accounts that align with your brand’s personality so you can reach an audience similar to yours. Additionally, you could also ride the coattails of videos that are currently viral across TikTok, which will help you get a lot of eyes on your brand. If you manage to get the top comment in the video, that means you stand a chance at being noticed by millions of people.\
\
For example, Blue, the official mascot of the Indianapolis Colts, commented on a popular Duolingo TikTok where Duo, the brand’s mascot, is jokingly forcing a linguistic influencer to apologize for something he said. The quick interaction between the two accounts received a ton of eyeballs as the video alone has garnered a million views.\
\
![Comment on other videos](https://s.influencermarketinghub.com/imaginary/convert?type=webp&url=https://influencermarketinghub.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/09/image10-1024x804.jpg)\
\
_Source: [tiktok.com](https://www.tiktok.com/@duolingo/video/7119947618532314411?is_from_webapp=v1&item_id=7119947618532314411)_\
\
* * *\
\
### **7\. Create video replies to relevant comments**\
\
TikTok gives you the ability to create content to respond to specific comments from your previous videos. The original comment will be highlighted in the response video to give viewers some context. Make the most of this feature to provide your audience with content that answers their top questions or addresses their major concerns.\
\
This is a great way to get people interested in what you have to say because you’re addressing something that another member of the audience has brought up. Chances are the comment is similar to their experience or related to the question they had in mind. So, you might get people commenting about how the video is helpful to them.\
\
Moreover, seeing you answer people’s comments through video may compel many users to leave their own comments in the hopes of getting a video response from you. Glossier, for instance, regularly creates videos responding to interesting comments about how to use their products.\
\
In the following video, they responded to a user who didn’t realize that a specific product was supposed to be used a certain way. The brand highlighted all the different ways the product can be used and included a caption asking others how they use it.\
\
![Create video replies to relevant comments ](https://s.influencermarketinghub.com/imaginary/convert?type=webp&url=https://influencermarketinghub.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/09/image9-1024x561.jpg)\
\
_Source: [tiktok.com](https://www.tiktok.com/@glossier/video/7123985338380324139?is_from_webapp=v1&item_id=7123985338380324139)_\
\
As you can expect, lots of users shared how they used the product while others talked about how “this makes sense.” You can also find plenty of questions from other users who have seen how the brand is responsive to people’s questions.\
\
![Create video replies to relevant comments ](https://s.influencermarketinghub.com/imaginary/convert?type=webp&url=https://influencermarketinghub.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/09/image12-1024x910.jpg)\
\
_Source: [tiktok.com](https://www.tiktok.com/@glossier/video/7123985338380324139?is_from_webapp=v1&item_id=7123985338380324139)_\
\
* * *\
\
### **8\. Tackle a “controversial” topic (with caution)**\
\
If there’s anything that gets people commenting, it’s a controversial topic. Create content around topics that are likely to spark a debate so you can get more comments on your video. However, that doesn’t mean you should create enmity between your audience by bringing up a divisive topic that challenges their values and viewpoints such as politics.\
\
Try to keep things fun and lighthearted by tackling less serious topics such as pineapple on pizza, toilet paper over or under, milk before or after cereal, and so on. You get the gist. The debate could also be specific to your industry to make it even more relevant to your audience.\
\
For example, Zendesk created a video tackling the topic of chatbots in customer service. Naturally, customer service reps and consumers who follow the [brand on TikTok](https://influencermarketinghub.com/tiktok-for-business/) flooded the comments section to share their thoughts on the use of chatbots.\
\
> [@zendesk](https://www.tiktok.com/@zendesk?refer=embed "@zendesk") ? ? Chatbots: friend or foe? [#customerservice](https://www.tiktok.com/tag/customerservice?refer=embed "customerservice") [#zendesk](https://www.tiktok.com/tag/zendesk?refer=embed "zendesk") [#chat](https://www.tiktok.com/tag/chat?refer=embed "chat") [#chatbot](https://www.tiktok.com/tag/chatbot?refer=embed "chatbot") [#ai](https://www.tiktok.com/tag/ai?refer=embed "ai") [#artificialintelligence](https://www.tiktok.com/tag/artificialintelligence?refer=embed "artificialintelligence") [♬ original sound - Zendesk](https://www.tiktok.com/music/original-sound-7112530463796906795?refer=embed "♬ original sound - Zendesk")\
\
* * *\
\
### **Get People Commenting**\
\
The TikTok comments section serves as the perfect place for brands, creators, and users to connect. Make the most of the tips shared above to get people to comment on your posts and boost your engagement rate.\
\
## Frequently Asked Questions\
\
### Does commenting boost TikTok videos?\
\
The TikTok algorithm counts comments as engagement, which is used to determine the popularity and relevance of a video among a certain audience. That means it decides which videos to show to certain users based on the number of comments and likes in each video. As such, commenting can help boost the visibility of TikTok videos.\
\
### Do comments get you more views on TikTok?\
\
Comments are used to determine the popularity of a video so TikTok can decide which videos to display in relevant For You pages. So, the more comments you receive, the more popular it’ll deem your video. That means your video will be displayed to more people, which will result in more views.\
\
### How do I control comments on TikTok?\
\
You can control comments on TikTok from your account privacy settings. TikTok lets you control who can comment on your videos. You can also turn off commenting altogether. TikTok also has comment filtering features, which allows you to hide all or specific comments unless you specifically approve them.\
\
### What does limited comments mean on TikTok?\
\
Limited comments on TikTok means that the creator has restricted who can comment on their videos. They may restrict it to only their friends (followers they follow back) or even turn off comments entirely.\
\
### Can the creator delete comments on TikTok?\
\
Yes, TikTok lets you delete comments on videos that you’ve created. That means you can better moderate your comments section and get rid of anything that could be considered offensive or hateful towards you or specific groups of people.\
\
About the Author\
\
![Influencer Marketing Hub](https://influencermarketinghub.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/03/cropped-imh_filled_pink-1-96x96.png)\
\

\

web.title: Proven Strategies to Boost Your TikTok Engagement
web.description: 10 Proven Strategies That Help Creators Boost Engagement · 1. Start with a Strong Hook · 2. Post Consistently · 3. Use Trending Hashtags and Sounds.
web.markdown:
[Skip to content](https://www.side-line.com/strategies-boost-tiktok-engagement/#content)

January 31, 2026

🇺🇦 **Side-Line stands with Ukraine** \- [Show your Support](https://sidelinemag.bandcamp.com/album/electronic-resistance-reconstruction)

TikTok has completely changed the way creators connect with audiences. It’s fast, unpredictable, and endlessly creative where a single video can explode overnight. But with millions of videos posted every day, standing out and keeping people engaged has become harder than ever. Many creators post regularly but still find themselves asking, “Why aren’t people liking or interacting with my videos?”

Engagement likes, comments, shares, and saves doesn’t happen by accident. It’s earned through strategy, timing, and authenticity. And at the heart of it all? Likes. Because likes are more than vanity metrics, they’re small signals of connection. They tell both the algorithm and the creator.

Below are ten proven strategies that help creators boost engagement, earn more real likes, and build loyal communities that last.

Table of contents

- [1 10 Proven Strategies That Help Creators Boost Engagement](https://www.side-line.com/strategies-boost-tiktok-engagement/#10_Proven_Strategies_That_Help_Creators_Boost_Engagement)
  - [1.1 1\. Start with a Strong Hook](https://www.side-line.com/strategies-boost-tiktok-engagement/#1_Start_with_a_Strong_Hook)
  - [1.2 2\. Post Consistently](https://www.side-line.com/strategies-boost-tiktok-engagement/#2_Post_Consistently)
  - [1.3 3\. Use Trending Hashtags and Sounds](https://www.side-line.com/strategies-boost-tiktok-engagement/#3_Use_Trending_Hashtags_and_Sounds)
  - [1.4 4\. Engage With Your Audience](https://www.side-line.com/strategies-boost-tiktok-engagement/#4_Engage_With_Your_Audience)
  - [1.5 5\. Buy Real TikTok Likes](https://www.side-line.com/strategies-boost-tiktok-engagement/#5_Buy_Real_TikTok_Likes)
  - [1.6 6\. Write Captions That Spark Action](https://www.side-line.com/strategies-boost-tiktok-engagement/#6_Write_Captions_That_Spark_Action)
  - [1.7 7\. Create Shareable, Emotional Content](https://www.side-line.com/strategies-boost-tiktok-engagement/#7_Create_Shareable_Emotional_Content)
  - [1.8 8\. Maintain a Recognizable Style](https://www.side-line.com/strategies-boost-tiktok-engagement/#8_Maintain_a_Recognizable_Style)
  - [1.9 9\. Learn from TikTok Analytics](https://www.side-line.com/strategies-boost-tiktok-engagement/#9_Learn_from_TikTok_Analytics)
  - [1.10 10\. Collaborate With Other Creators](https://www.side-line.com/strategies-boost-tiktok-engagement/#10_Collaborate_With_Other_Creators)
- [2 Conclusion](https://www.side-line.com/strategies-boost-tiktok-engagement/#Conclusion)

## 10 Proven Strategies That Help Creators Boost Engagement

### 1\. Start with a Strong Hook

Attention on TikTok disappears in seconds sometimes less. That’s why creators often say the first three seconds make or break a video. A great hook could be anything: a bold statement funny reaction, a shocking fact, or even an oddly satisfying visual.

One social strategist put it perfectly: “A like starts with attention. If they don’t stop scrolling, they’ll never engage.” In other words, your hook isn’t just about watch time it’s the first step toward getting that tap on the heart.

### 2\. Post Consistently

Consistency is one of those things that sounds obvious until you realize how many people ignore it. TikTok’s algorithm loves creators who show up often. The more you post, the more data it gathers about your content and the more chances you have to be discovered.

Posting three to five times a week is often the sweet spot. It keeps your account alive in people’s feeds and gives you more opportunities to earn likes and engagement over time. Most successful creators stick to about three to five videos a week. It’s enough to stay visible without burning out.

### 3\. Use Trending Hashtags and Sounds

TikTok trends move faster than most creators can keep up with but joining the right ones can skyrocket visibility. Trending sounds, hashtags, and challenges aren’t just for fun; they’re shortcuts to discovery. When creators use popular audio or participate in viral challenges, their videos are more likely to land on the “For You” page. Still, it’s not about copying everyone else.

### 4\. Engage With Your Audience

Engagement on TikTok isn’t one-sided. Creators who thrive understand that posting a video is just the beginning. When followers see that you notice them, they engage more — and that includes tapping “like” more often. It’s simple psychology: people like creators who make them feel seen. When followers see that a creator actually reads their comments, it builds connection. That’s what makes audiences stay.

### 5\. Buy Real TikTok Likes

Sometimes, getting those first crucial likes on a new video can be challenging, especially when you’re just starting or releasing new content. If your video is struggling to gain initial traction, One proven strategy is to get TikTok likes from Media Mister is the [best site to buy TikTok likes](https://www.mediamister.com/buy-tiktok-likes) by this likes from active users, you give your content a head start.

This initial boost can help get your video noticed faster, increasing its chances of landing on the For You Page. The more early likes your video gets, the more visibility it receives, creating a cycle that leads to organic growth and greater engagement.

### 6\. Write Captions That Spark Action

Captions are often underrated, yet they’re one of the easiest ways to increase engagement. A good caption doesn’t just describe the video it invites the viewer to do something.

It could be as direct as “Double-tap if this made you laugh” or as subtle as “Who can relate?” TikTok’s algorithm notices when people interact, and engagement boosts visibility even if it’s just someone tapping the heart button. So next time, try adding a small nudge in your caption. You’d be surprised how much it helps.

### 7\. Create Shareable, Emotional Content

The most shared TikToks usually do one of three things: make people laugh, make them feel something, or make them say, “Wow, that’s me.” Relatable moments spread fast because they trigger emotion humor, nostalgia, empathy, or excitement.

A heartfelt story or funny situation can connect with strangers instantly. People don’t just watch those videos they share them, tag friends, and come back for more.

### 8\. Maintain a Recognizable Style

Consistency isn’t only about frequency it’s also about style. Viewers tend to engage more with creators they can recognize instantly. This might mean using the same editing style, colors, or tone across your videos. A consistent “look” builds familiarity, and familiarity builds trust.

For instance, some creators have signature editing sounds, camera angles, or even catchphrases that make their videos stand out. It’s less about perfection and more about building a personality people can spot within seconds.

### 9\. Learn from TikTok Analytics

TikTok gives creators a goldmine of data and most barely look at it. Analytics show when audiences are most active, which topics perform best, and even how long people watch before scrolling away. Successful creators use this info to fine-tune their strategy. If certain sounds or posting times consistently bring in higher engagement, they double down.

### 10\. Collaborate With Other Creators

Collabs are one of the fastest ways to grow organically. Partnering with other TikTokers through duets, stitches, or co-created skits introduces your content to new audiences.

When two creators share overlapping interests or humor styles, both audiences benefit. It’s community building in its purest form. And honestly? It’s fun. Collaboration keeps content fresh, adds new perspectives, and often results in more likes, comments, and shares than solo videos.

## Conclusion

Boosting engagement on TikTok isn’t about chasing viral fame; it’s about creating content that feels human. Real growth comes from consistency, creativity, and conversation not just views or follower counts.

Every like, comment, and share is a small sign that someone connected with your story. And over time, those connections add up to something powerful community. The best creators don’t just post videos they build relationships. And that’s what turns engagement into long-term success.

![Bernard - Side-Line Staff](<Base64-Image-Removed>)

[Bernard - Side-Line Staff](https://www.side-line.com/author/bernard/)

Chief editor of Side-Line – which basically means I spend my days wading through a relentless flood of press releases from labels, artists, DJs, and zealous correspondents. My job? Strip out the promo nonsense, verify what’s actually real, and decide which stories make the cut and which get tossed into the digital void. Outside the news filter bubble, I’m all in for quality sushi and helping raise funds for Ukraine’s ongoing fight against the modern-day axis of evil.

[side-line.com](https://side-line.com/)

[Twitter](https://x.com/Bernardvi "Twitter")[Linkedin](https://www.linkedin.com/in/bernardvanisacker/ "Linkedin")[Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/Bernard.Van.Isacker.Ieper/ "Facebook")[Phone](tel:0032486475272 "Phone")

**Since you’re here …**

… we have a small favour to ask. More people are reading Side-Line Magazine than ever but advertising revenues across the media are falling fast. Unlike many news organisations, we haven’t put up a paywall – we want to keep our journalism as open as we can - and we refuse to add annoying advertising. So you can see why we need to ask for your help.

Side-Line’s independent journalism takes a lot of time, money and hard work to produce. But we do it because we want to push the artists we like and who are equally fighting to survive.

If everyone who reads our reporting, who likes it, helps fund it, our future would be much more secure. For as little as 5 US$, you can support Side-Line Magazine – and it only takes a minute. Thank you.

_The donations are safely powered by Paypal._

- [donate monthly](https://www.side-line.com/strategies-boost-tiktok-engagement/#tabs-1)
- [donate once only](https://www.side-line.com/strategies-boost-tiktok-engagement/#tabs-2)
